title: tetramicra schoenina
intro: Tetramicra schoenina is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as the "Prairie Copperflower", a small perennial plant native to the grasslands of the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Tetramicra schoenina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used for its medicinal properties.
